posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are having requests from Admins who do not know if they need to update Apps to their next major version.

Could monday.com display a link to the App changelog page, if one exists?

Each App builder could then provide instructions about how to decide to update or not update the App.

The Admin could forward this link to key Users who will know how the changes will really impact them.

Thanks.
Laurent
